title: "What's Nearby" POI Section on Accommodation Detail

tasks.title: Add NearbyPoi + query-params Zod schemas
tasks.description: In packages/schemas (POI entity): NearbyPoiSchema = PointOfInterestPublicSchema.extend({ distanceKm: z.number().nonnegative() }); NearbyPoiQuerySchema = { radius?: number default 5, min 0.1, max 20; limit?: number default 12, min 1, max 50 }. Export the inferred types. Tests: unit tests asserting defaults, min/max bounds rejection, and distanceKm shape. Test file: packages/schemas/test/entities/point-of-interest/nearby-poi.schema.test.ts.

tasks.title: PointOfInterestModel.findWithinRadius (geo.ts wiring)
tasks.description: Add findWithinRadius({ lat, long, radiusKm, limit }) to packages/db PointOfInterestModel. Wire buildWithinRadiusClause + buildDistanceOrderByExpr from packages/db/src/utils/geo.ts against pointsOfInterest.lat/long (plain doublePrecision, pass directly, NO buildJsonbCoordinateExprs). Filters: lifecycleState = ACTIVE, deletedAt IS NULL, lat/long IS NOT NULL (R-1 guard). Order by distance asc, apply limit. Return POI rows + computed distanceKm. Tests: in-range, out-of-range excluded, null-coord POI excluded, non-ACTIVE/soft-deleted excluded, ascending-distance ordering, limit honored. Test file: packages/db/test/models/point-of-interest-find-within-radius.test.ts (or integration if geo SQL needs a real DB).

subtasks.title: Order by distance asc + limit + distanceKm projection
Unit/integration tests incl null-coord + ordering + bounds

tasks.title: PointOfInterestService.getNearby
tasks.description: Add getNearby({ lat, long, radiusKm, limit }, actor, ctx?) to PointOfInterestService. runWithLoggingAndValidation wrapper over model.findWithinRadius; project results to the public shape + distanceKm (NearbyPoi). Keep it GENERIC so HOS-146/147 can reuse it. Tests: unit tests with mocked model verifying projection, distanceKm passthrough, and empty result handling. Test file: packages/service-core/test/services/point-of-interest/getNearby.test.ts.

subtasks.title: getNearby method + public projection to NearbyPoi

tasks.title: AccommodationService.getNearbyPois (reads real coords)
tasks.description: Add getNearbyPois({ slug, radiusKm?, limit? }, actor, ctx?) to AccommodationService. Read the RAW accommodation (real location.coordinates.{lat,long} strings from JSONB, BEFORE any privacy projection). If no coordinates -> return []. Else parse to numbers and delegate to PointOfInterestService.getNearby. Return ONLY the POI list; the accommodation coordinate must NEVER be in the result (AC-4/AC-5, R-4). Apply defaults radius 5 / limit 12 when omitted. Tests: unit tests for (a) accommodation with coords -> delegates with correct real lat/long, (b) no-coordinates -> [], (c) unparseable coords -> [], (d) result never contains accommodation coords. Test file: packages/service-core/test/services/accommodation/getNearbyPois.test.ts.

subtasks.title: Delegate to getNearby with real lat/long + defaults
Unit tests incl AC-4 (no coord leak) + no-coords empty

tasks.title: Public API route GET /accommodations/:slug/nearby-pois
tasks.description: Add apps/api/src/routes/accommodation/public/nearbyPois.ts via createPublicRoute. Validate query params against NearbyPoiQuerySchema (radius/limit). Resolve actor via getActorFromContext, call AccommodationService.getNearbyPois. Respond { items: NearbyPoi[] } (empty array when no coords / no POIs; 404 only when slug does not resolve to a public accommodation). Cache 300s + rate-limit like sibling public POI routes. Register in public/index.ts. Tests: integration test asserting 200 + items shape, ordering, empty-array cases, AND AC-4 privacy assertion (response JSON contains NO accommodation lat/long anywhere). Test file: apps/api/test/integration/accommodation/nearby-pois.test.ts.

subtasks.title: Integration test: items shape + ordering + empty

tasks.title: Web API client accommodationsApi.getNearbyPois
tasks.description: Add getNearbyPois({ slug, radius?, limit? }) to accommodationsApi in apps/web/src/lib/api/endpoints.ts, calling GET /public/accommodations/:slug/nearby-pois and returning ApiResult<NearbyPoi[]>. Tests: unit test with mocked apiClient verifying path + params. Test file: apps/web/test/lib/api/accommodations-nearby-pois.test.ts.

tasks.title: i18n keys for the nearby-POI section
tasks.description: Add accommodations.detail.nearbyPoi.title (and any distance-format helper strings) to packages/i18n es/en/pt accommodations.json. Reuse existing destinations.poiTypeLabels.* for type badges (cross-namespace). Tests: i18n key-parity check already enforced by the package's suite; ensure all three locales present. No new test file unless parity harness needs an entry.

tasks.title: WhatsNearbySection.astro presentational component
tasks.description: Add apps/web/src/components/accommodation/WhatsNearbySection.astro (props: items: ReadonlyArray<NearbyPoi>, locale). Mirror DestinationPOISection.astro: per POI show getPointOfInterestTypeIcon, translatePoiName, translatePoiTypeLabel, formatted distance, optional 2-line-clamped resolveI18nText description. Order by ascending distanceKm. Empty convention: if !items || items.length === 0 -> render nothing. Include a pure distance-format util (< 1km -> meters rounded to nearest 50; >= 1km -> km with 1 decimal, locale separator). CSS module colocated (web = vanilla CSS/CSS Modules, NOT Tailwind). Tests: unit test for the distance-format util (boundaries: 0, 949m->950m, 1000m->1,0km, 1250m->1,3km). Test file: apps/web/test/lib/format-distance.test.ts.

tasks.title: Wire SSR fetch + section into accommodation detail page
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/[slug].astro: SSR-fetch nearby POIs via accommodationsApi.getNearbyPois({ slug }) and render <WhatsNearbySection items={...} locale={...} /> right after <LocationSection /> (~line 578). Fetch must fail soft (network error -> empty section, never breaks the page). Tests: covered by T-011 acceptance flow; add a focused render assertion if a page-level test harness exists.

tasks.title: Component render tests (ordering + empty + distance)
tasks.description: Web component tests for WhatsNearbySection: (a) renders items ordered nearest-first, (b) empty items -> nothing rendered (no header), (c) distance labels formatted correctly, (d) name/type/icon resolve via helpers with humanized-slug fallback (no [MISSING: leaks, AC-7). Test file: apps/web/test/components/accommodation/WhatsNearbySection.test.ts.

tasks.title: End-to-end acceptance verification (AC-1..AC-6)
tasks.description: Cross-cutting verification against the running app / integration layer: AC-1 (accommodation with coords + nearby ACTIVE POIs shows ordered list), AC-2 (no coords -> no section, no error), AC-3 (all-excluded POIs -> no section), AC-5 (distances from real coords, not approximateLocation), AC-6 (radius/limit bounds honored). Reuse the route integration test from T-005 for backend ACs; add a page-level check for AC-1/AC-2 if the web e2e harness supports it. Document the run in the Linear issue.

subtasks.title: Backend AC coverage via route integration
